Images extracted from "Arcade Title slides.pptx" (largest embedded raster per slide).

Filenames: slide-NNN.png — use with Jekyll:
  {{ '/assets/images/arcade-title-slides/slide-013.png' | relative_url }}

Slide ↔ booth mapping (editorial — adjust if your deck order differs):
  005  Provision AAP in Developer Sandbox
  009  Automation Dashboard
  010  Ansible Lightspeed Intelligent Assistant
  012  Automating AI Infrastructure (used for Instana-style AI tile)
  013  Automation for AIOps
  014  AIOps: Self-Healing Infrastructure with AAP
  015  AIOps: ServiceNow LEAP…
  017  Automate Multi-Cloud Insights with AAP
  018  Ansible Automation on AWS
  019  AAP on Azure (managed app) subscription
  020  AAP on AWS: Getting Started
  021  Getting set up with AAP on Azure: Managed Application
  022  AAP on AWS: Automation Mesh Configuration
  024  Ansible & Terraform Better Together
  025  Terraform Actions and Ansible Automation Platform
  026  Manage Ansible Secrets with Hashicorp Vault
  028  Automating Multi-Repo Deployments with Event-Driven Ansible (Splunk-adjacent tile)
  031  Installing Ansible Dev Container in VS Code
  032  Policy Enforcement with AAP
  035  Automation Dashboard Installation
  040  Automating Day 2 Windows VM Operations
  041  AAP: Deploy & Remove Apps on RHEL
  042  Patching Red Hat Enterprise Linux VMs
  045  Network Automation with AAP
  048  Managing OpenShift VMs with AAP / virtualization track
  052  Advance Your Automation Maturity (workflow placeholder)
  079–087  Cloud / Azure / AWS variant slides (see deck)

Many late slides share the same background asset in the source file; replace slide numbers in README if you reorder the deck.
